start.line: Let me guess. You owe Nib nine dollars, you 'already paid,' and now there's a whole DAY about it. I've seen this episode.

options.text: There's a trivia pot. I could use a brain.
You do the crossword in PEN?
Just saying hi. Genuinely nothing else.

trivia.line: You could use a brain the way a boat could use a hull. Fine — I'm in, but ONLY because that tall lunatic thinks the War of 1812 was a phone number and someone responsible has to be at that buzzer.

options.text: On second thought I'll wing it.

pen.line: In pen, in ink, in PUBLIC. Commitment, Artie. You should try it on something other than a grudge.

wing.line: You'll 'wing it.' The last thing you winged was that jacket, and look how that turned out. I'll be in the booth, being right, if you need me.

joined.line: Good. Rule one: you don't answer. You've never once been right and I'm not starting a streak of it now.
